# एसएलए विवरण | SLA Details
1. Hiring of Customised AMC/CMC for Pre-owned Products places through GeM shall be governed by following set of Terms and Conditions:
 1. General terms and conditions for Goods and Services.
 2. Service Specific STC of Hiring of AMC/CMC service for Other Products - as defined in Service Catalogue which includes SLA for the Service or a Service for a particular product.
 3. Buyer Specific Authentic STC.
2. Operation of the above terms and conditions in reverse order of precedence i.e. ATC supplementary Service SPECIFIC STC and GTC, however Service Specific STC will prevails or supersede the GTC wherever there are any conflicting provisions setting.
3. The above set of conditions along with scope of supply of services and any other document incorporated in the contract document shall be construed to be part of the contract.
4. This Agreement represents a Comprehensive Terms and Conditions governing the contract between the Buyer and Service Provider. # Page 3
non-compliance will be treated as breach of contract and Buyer may take suitable actions as per GeM Contract.

2. Buyer Added Bid Specific Terms and Conditions-

2.1 Generic:
OPTION CLAUSE: The buyer can increase or decrease the contract quantity or contract duration up to 25 percent at the time of Issue of the contract. However, once the contract is issued, contract quantity or contract duration can only be increased up to 25 percent. Bidders are bound to accept the revised quantity or duration

2.2 Certificates:
Bidder's offer is liable to be rejected if they don't upload any of the certificates / documents sought in the Bid document, ATC and Corrigendum if any.

2.3 Generic:
1. The Seller shall not assign the Contract in whole or part without obtaining the prior written consent of buyer.
2. The Seller shall not sub-contract the Contract in whole or part to any entity without obtaining the prior written consent of buyer.
3. The Seller shall, notwithstanding the consent and assignment/sub-contract, remain jointly and severally liable and responsible to buyer together with the assigned sub-contractor, for and in the end of in due performance of the Contract and the Seller's obligations there under.

[Doc: Final Contract-1.pdf | Section: एसएलए विवरण | SLA Details > Page 3]
# Page 3
2.4 Purchase preference to MSE and Small Enterprises (MSEs): Purchase preference will be given to MSEs as defined in Public Procurement Policy for Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) Order, 2012 dated 23.03.2012 issued by Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises and its subsequent Orders/Notifications issued by concerned Ministry. If the bidder wants to avail the Purchase preference, the bidder must be the manufacturer of the offered product in case of bid for supply of goods. Traders are excluded from the purchase preference policy for all bids. In case of bid for supply of services, the bidder must be the service provider of the offered service and must submit the documentary evidence in this regard shall be uploaded along with the bid in respect of the offered product or service. If L - 1 is not an MSE and MSE Seller (s) have/quote awarded price within L- 1+ 15% of margins of purchase preference /price band defined in relevant policy, such Seller shall be given opportunity to match L-1 price and contract will be awarded in proportion of 100% of total value.

2.5 Service & Support:
Escalation Matrix for Service Support: Bidder/OEM must provide Escalation Matrix of Telephone Numbers for Service Support.

2.6 Buyer Added Bid Specific ATC:
Buyer Added text based ATC clauses

Eligibility Criteria:

Bidder has to submit valid Authorization Letter from OEM M/s Techser Power Solutions or self- certification in case of OEM at the time of bid submission.

Note:
1. Service Providers are required to raise invoices online as per the contract terms on GeM portal. Timely invoice submission is mandatory for compliances, smooth payment processing, and will also contribute to improving their ratings.
2. The Excess settlement has been enabled for this contract. The service provider can claim additional charges, if applicable, in the invoice. Any additional charges must be supported with documentary evidence.

नोट: यह सिस्टम जनरेटेड टेंडर है। कोई हस्ताक्षर की आवश्यकता नहीं है।
Note: This is system generated file. No signature is required.
